task_completion.description: Survey titled 'Executive Function Screening 2025' is created with backward navigation disabled and progress bar enabled.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Survey settings (Presentation & navigation) showing the title 'Executive Function Screening 2025', 'Allow backward navigation' set to Off/No, and 'Show progress bar' set to On/Yes.

task_completion.description: A question group named 'Speed Trial Block' is created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The survey structure menu or group editor shows a group titled 'Speed Trial Block'.

task_completion.description: Question 'EF01' is created as a List (Radio) with correct text, options, and randomized answer order.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Question editor for 'EF01' showing the text 'Select the number that is ODD.', question type 'List (Radio)', answer options (2, 4, 7, 8), and 'Random order' enabled in the Display/Logic settings.

task_completion.description: Question 'EF01' has a 10-second time limit, moves on without warning, and the next button is enabled.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Timer settings for 'EF01' showing 'Time limit' = 10, 'Time limit action' = 'Move on without warning', and 'Time limit disable next' = Off/No (meaning the next button remains enabled).

task_completion.description: Question 'EF02' is created as a List (Radio) with correct text, options, and randomized answer order.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Question editor for 'EF02' showing the text 'Select the letter that is a VOWEL.', question type 'List (Radio)', answer options (K, P, A, T), and 'Random order' enabled.

task_completion.description: Question 'EF02' has a 5-second time limit and moves on without warning.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Timer settings for 'EF02' showing 'Time limit' = 5 and 'Time limit action' = 'Move on without warning'.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the LimeSurvey web interface to create the survey.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the LimeSurvey admin dashboard and form fields being filled out in a web browser, rather than terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: Answer options were entered into the proper LimeSurvey answer options interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent adding options (2, 4, 7, 8 and K, P, A, T) in the 'Edit answer options' screen for the respective questions, not just typed into a text editor.

integrity.description: The agent manually configured the survey rather than importing a pre-made .lss file.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show step-by-step creation of the survey, question group, and questions, rather than a single 'Import survey' action.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The survey must be titled 'Executive Function Screening 2025'. Question 1 must have code 'EF01', a 10-second timer, and timer action 'Move on without warning' (moveon). Question 2 must have code 'EF02', a 5-second timer, and timer action 'Move on without warning' (moveon).
